name: clockify
description: Read and add Clockify time entries.
long_description:
This extension gives Claude access to a Clockify workspace.

List workspaces and projects, view recent time entries within a date window, and create or start time entries against any project (by ID or by name, case-insensitive). Your API key is held in the server process and never enters Claude's context.

Not affiliated with or endorsed by Clockify.

tools.name: list_workspaces
tools.description: List all Clockify workspaces the current user belongs to

tools.name: list_projects
tools.description: List projects in a workspace (defaults to the user's active workspace)

tools.name: list_time_entries
tools.description: List recent time entries for the current user, optionally filtered by an ISO 8601 start/end window

tools.name: get_all_time_entries
tools.description: Fetch every time entry in a start/end window and return CSV (id, project, description, start, end, duration_minutes, billable). `start`/`end` may be dates (YYYY-MM-DD) or ISO 8601 timestamps; dates expand to the full day in UTC. Paginates internally.

tools.name: add_time_entries
tools.description: Add one or more time entries. Each item takes `project` (ID or name), `start` (ISO 8601), optional `end` (omit to start a running timer), `description`, and `billable`.

api_key.title: Clockify API Key
api_key.description: Your Clockify API key. Find it under Profile settings → API in Clockify.
